onboarding.slide1_desc: Your credentials are encrypted and stored safely. Enjoy modern secure login powered by GraphQL.
onboarding.slide2_desc: Built with decoupled data, domain, and presentation layers for extreme reliability and testability.
onboarding.slide3_desc: Supports multiple languages via Easy Localization and handles network errors seamlessly.
